data.name: Hentai Girls: The Princesses
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Girls: The Princesses

A godsend for fans of hentai and NSFW puzzles! AAA-quality nudity pictures (anime style), visual novel elements, arousing female moans, beautiful design with animation, relaxing music, gallery, zoom, cheat and achievements.

Instructions:

You need to restore the picture by swapping the bricks.

Key features:

  • AAA-quality nudity pictures
  • Visual novel elements
  • Arousing female moans
  • Two levels of difficulty (normal and hard)
  • Zoom (you can see every detail!)
  • High-quality design (interface, animations)
  • Gallery
  • Cheat (F key)
  • Nice relaxing music
  • 20 achievements with beautiful girls (for Steam profile design)
  • Can be played with one hand ✊

Achievement Showcase

Will be available later, after Steam approval

data.short_description: A godsend for fans of hentai and NSFW puzzles! AAA-quality nudity pictures (anime style), visual novel elements, arousing female moans, beautiful design with animation, relaxing music, gallery, zoom, cheat and achievements.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:

  • OS *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • Processor: 2.4 Ghz Dual Core
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Graphics card supporting DirectX 11
